stemHtml: In an ignition system during a normal start of a gas turbine engine, igniter activation:

options.a: commences upon starter motor engagement, and is deactivated at a rotor speed of approximately 15% below idle rpm.
options.b: should commence prior to fuel entering the combustion chamber.
options.c: should commence after fuel has entered the combustion chamber.
options.d: should commence prior to starter motor engagement to prevent a hot start.
